$comment: Per-platform build config. The build script (scripts/build.js) reads this plus src/body/ and writes each platform's self-contained skill folder. To add a platform, add a block here — no other file changes.

shared.name: turtleneck
shared.description: Grounded, advisory design-critic for coding agents. One command, five modes: init (distill a project's design system into a committed knowledge artifact), update (refresh that artifact after the design system changes, merged and behind approval), review (report where UI work diverges from it — read-only), explain (trace why a finding/component/token/principle is what it is — read-only), and pass (apply UI improvements, behind a human-approved diff). Use when the user says "turtleneck", "design review", "review this UI against our design system", "design pass", "explain this design finding", "set up design knowledge", or invokes /turtleneck. Augmentation, not enforcement — it never blocks builds or gates CI.

frontmatter.argument-hint: [init | update | review | explain | pass]  (no arg = show the menu)
